message: Only the first --format occurrence is validated (argv.indexOf('--format')). `version --format json --format yaml` exits 0 and prints {"version":"0.1.0"}, despite containing the unsupported value yaml as a later --format occurrence. This mirrors the pre-existing parseNameFlag idiom exactly (also indexOf-based, first-occurrence-wins) which the plan explicitly directed this code to follow, and repeated flags are not part of any goal-stated verification command or existing test. Advisory, not a regression against any existing contract.
